name: tockBusinessGuestProfile
description: tockBusinessGuestProfile schema from Tock Guest Model

business.description: The details of the business in the business group.

note.description: A list of notes attached to the guest for just this business and not shared with every business in the business group.

tag.description: A list of tags attached to this guest for just this business and not shared with every business in the business group.

spend.description: Guest spend data for the business.
